cascade.designation: 100 m direct-buried PVC SWA submain from main service entrance to outbuilding SDB

walk_up_trail.reject_reason: Iz 108.1 A (Iz_base 101 × Ca 1.07) ≥ In 100 marginally — but Vd 9.74% far exceeds 3% power-circuit limit; eliminated by vd test on next walk

checks.cpc_adiabatic_source: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 543.1.3 + Reg 543.2.5 (SWA armour insufficient as CPC for 6 kA × 0.4 s adiabatic; separate 35 mm² Cu CPC routed per Reg 543.2.5 alternative). Adiabatic k×S = 143 × 35 = 5005 ≥ √(I²t) = √(6000² × 0.4) = 3795. PASS.

non_compliance_flags.message: Vd binding constraint on 100 m direct-buried submain — walked up 16→25→35→50→70 mm² to satisfy App 12 §6.4 3% power-circuit limit. SWA armour insufficient as CPC for 6 kA × 0.4 s adiabatic; separate 35 mm² Cu CPC routed per Reg 543.2.5 alternative.
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 Table 4D5A method D + App 12 §6.4 + Reg 543.2.5

assumptions: Engineer-declared Ze + parent_node_ifault_ka = 6 kA per DNO declaration at main service entrance.
Soil thermal resistivity 2.5 K·m/W (BS 7671 App 4 §2.4 default for undisturbed UK soil at 0.5–0.7 m depth).
Ca = 1.07 for ambient 15°C against the 20°C buried reference per BS 7671 App 4 Table 4B2 (PVC).
calc.cable_ampacity / calc.voltage_drop / calc.cpc_adiabatic deferred per WI3 — engineer estimates used as placeholder values; 4D5A canonical table values used.

rationale.chat_summary: 100 m direct-buried PVC SWA submain from a 100 A SP&N rural service entrance to an outbuilding SDB. Per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 Table 4D5A method D, soil 2.5 K·m/W, ambient 15°C. Walk-up rejected 16/25/35/50 mm² on the App 12 §6.4 3% power-circuit Vd limit; 70 mm² accepted at Vd 2.19%. SWA armour insufficient as CPC for 6 kA × 0.4 s adiabatic; separate 35 mm² Cu CPC routed per Reg 543.2.5 alternative.

sections.title: Project Supply + Jurisdiction
sections.summary: GB jurisdiction → BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 governs. Single-phase 230 V TN-S supply at rural service entrance; declared parent_node_ifault_ka = 6 kA from DNO declaration. Outbuilding sub-distribution board fed via a 100 m direct-buried submain — the cable run that drives this cable-sizing study.

sections.title: Cascade Tree + Topology
sections.summary: Single-node cascade: the SUBMAIN-CABLE sub_feeder represents the 100 m direct-buried run between the main service entrance (parent reference SERVICE-IN, outside the cable-sizing scope) and the outbuilding SDB (downstream consumer). Schema CascadeNode requires route + selection + checks, so endpoints without cable runs are not modelled as cascade nodes.

sections.title: Walk-the-Ladder Approach + Binding Constraints
sections.summary: Five walk-up entries record the trail. 16 mm² fails ampacity-after-Vd-application; 25/35/50 mm² fail App 12 §6.4 3% power-circuit Vd; 70 mm² accepted at Vd 2.19%. binding_constraint = vd_cumulative — the 100 m length is the dominant constraint, not ampacity. Iz at 70 mm² (255.7 A corrected) is comfortably ≥ In 100 A.

sections.title: Why 4D5A method D
sections.summary: Multicore PVC SWA cable, 2-core single-phase, copper, direct-buried 0.6 m depth in undisturbed soil — method D is the canonical BS 7671 App 4 reference per Table 4D5A's installation_methods block. Ca = 1.07 applied per Table 4B2 for ambient 15°C against the 20°C buried-cable reference; Cg = 1.0 (single circuit).

sections.title: Voltage drop walk-up arithmetic
sections.summary: Per-CSA Vd computed as Vd = (mVAm × L × Ib) / 1000 then divided by 230 V (single-phase). 25 mm² mVAm 1.75: Vd = 14.00 V = 6.09%. 35 mm² mVAm 1.25: Vd = 10.00 V = 4.35%. 50 mm² mVAm 0.93: Vd = 7.44 V = 3.23%. 70 mm² mVAm 0.63: Vd = 5.04 V = 2.19% — ACCEPTED. App 12 §6.4 power-circuit limit 3% drives the walk-up; lighting-circuit limit 6% not applicable to a power submain.

sections.title: CPC alternative per Reg 543.2.5
sections.summary: SWA armour CSA on a 70 mm² 2-core PVC SWA cable ≈ 50 mm² steel. Adiabatic check (k = 46 for steel armour per BS 7671 Table 54.7): k × S = 46 × 50 = 2300, against required √(I²t) = √(6000² × 0.4) = 3795. 2300 < 3795 → adiabatic FAILS with armour-only CPC. Per Reg 543.2.5, a separate copper CPC may be routed alongside the SWA cable. Selected 35 mm² Cu CPC: k = 143 (Cu/PVC), k × S = 143 × 35 = 5005 ≥ 3795. PASS.

sections.title: Motor Starting + Parallel Cables + Harmonic Derating
sections.summary: Not applicable. The submain feeds a sub-distribution board (mixed downstream load) rather than a single motor. parallel_count = 1; no harmonic content declared; motor_starting_vd_pct + motor_starting_vd_pass null.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions + Tool-Call Pending
sections.summary: compliant = true. One info-severity flag documents the vd_cumulative walk-up + Reg 543.2.5 CPC alternative for the runtime consumer's design audit trail. Three TOOL-CALL-PENDING flags (calc.cable_ampacity, calc.voltage_drop, calc.cpc_adiabatic) record the WI3 deferral of deterministic Python calc resolution.

sections.title: Sprint C.2 transcription honesty disclosure
sections.summary: Table 4D5A values used in this example were engineer-transcribed during Sprint C.2 from industry-standard references; the source file shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/appendix4-table-4D5A-pvc-swa.json carries verification_status: engineer_transcription_C2. Engineer-of-record MUST verify against the published BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 edition before runtime use. INV-12 Rule 4 enforces this disclosure on every example consuming 4D5A.

invariants.evidence: Standard BS 7671 CSA selection: 70 mm² phase for SUBMAIN-CABLE (selection.phase_csa = 70) is on the BS 7671 App 4 ladder {16, 25, 35, 50, 70, 95, 120, 150, 185}; binding_constraint = 'vd_cumulative' confirms voltage-drop-limited selection driven by the 100 m run length.

Iz ≥ In per BS 7671 §433.1.1: walk_up_trail records iz_corrected_a = 255.7 A at the accepted 70 mm² CSA against In = 100 A (155.7 A headroom). The four rejected CSAs (16/25/35/50) each fail either Iz or App 12 §6.4 Vd 3% power-circuit limit.

Cumulative Vd ≤ 3% per BS 7671 App 12 §6.4 power-circuit limit: walk_up_trail records vd_cumulative_pct = 2.19% for the accepted 70 mm² CSA, inside the 3% budget. Single-node cascade so vd_segment_pct == vd_cumulative_pct.

CPC adiabatic check passes per BS 7671 §543.1.3: SWA armour fails the adiabatic test (steel k=46 × armour CSA ~50 mm² = 2300 < required √(6000² × 0.4) = 3795). Per Reg 543.2.5 alternative, separate 35 mm² copper CPC routed: k=143 × 35 = 5005 ≥ 3795. PASS. cpc_provision documents the non-default CPC routing.

cable_type pvc_swa maps to table_used 4D5A per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 + Sprint D2.1 compatibility matrix (Rule 1 PASS). Method D (direct-buried) is listed in 4D5A.installation_methods alongside method C (Rule 2 PASS). _source string 'BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 Table 4D5A method D' matches the (cable_type, installation_method) pair (Rule 3 PASS). reasoning.md cites the Sprint C.2 engineer_transcription_C2 disclosure for 4D5A (Rule 4 PASS).
